taglines.short: The next generation of digital maps
taglines.long: Explore the world with beautiful, detailed maps crafted by the community

search.name: Search
search.description: Search for places, businesses, and amenities

goto.name: Go to page
goto.description: Navigate to a page in the app

toggleTheme.name: Toggle theme
toggleTheme.description: Switch between light and dark themes

updateThemeRadius.name: Update theme radius
updateThemeRadius.description: Change corner radius of app elements

chooseMapEngine.name: Choose map engine
chooseMapEngine.description: Change the javascript engine used to render the map

mapbox.name: Mapbox GL
mapbox.description: A beautiful, detailed 3D map with dynamic lighting

maplibre.name: MapLibre GL
maplibre.description: A fork of Mapbox GL v1 with an open-source license

signOut.name: Sign out
signOut.confirmDescription: Make sure you have your recovery key saved — you'll need it or a passkey to sign back in.

network.title: Network error
network.description: Try connecting to a different {appName} server

measure.title: Measure
measure.empty: Click on the map to add points.

radius.title: Radius
radius.empty: Click on the map to set the center point.
radius.clickToConfirm: Click on the map to set the radius.

library.title: Library

empty.collectionBookmarks: No bookmarks in this collection yet

library.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?

createCollection.title: Create Collection
createCollection.description: Create a new collection to organize your bookmarks

deleteCollection.title: Delete Collection
deleteCollection.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

bookmarks.saveErrorNoOsmId: Cannot bookmark place without an OSM ID
bookmarks.saveErrorNoCollectionId: Bookmark must belong to at least one collection.
bookmarks.removeFromCollectionError: Failed to remove bookmark from collection.
bookmarks.updateErrorNotFound: Bookmark not found. It may have been deleted.

collections.addBookmarkError: Failed to add bookmark to collection
collections.fetchBookmarksError: Failed to fetch bookmarks in collection
collections.updateBookmarkError: Failed to update bookmark in collection

empty.title: You haven't added any friends yet.
empty.setupRequired: Set up your federation identity to connect with friends across servers.

addDialog.title: Add Friend
addDialog.description: Enter a friend's handle to send them an invitation. They can be on this server or any other Parchment server.
addDialog.userNotFound: User not found. Check the handle and try again.
addDialog.lookupFailed: Failed to look up user. Please try again.

e2ee.title: End-to-End Encrypted
e2ee.description: Your location is encrypted on your device. Only the friends you choose can decrypt it.

identity.title: Federation Identity
identity.description: Your identity for connecting with friends across servers
identity.configuredDescription: How other people find and verify you
identity.usernameDescription: Your unique name on this server
identity.shareHandleHint: Share this with friends so they can add you.
identity.setupDescription: Set up your federation identity to connect with friends and share data securely across Parchment servers.
identity.importDescription: Your identity exists on this server, but you need to import your recovery key to use it on this device.
identity.recoveryKeyDescription: View your recovery key for backup
identity.setupInvitations: Set up your identity to see invitations.
identity.restoreIdentityDescription: Your account has a federation identity — restore it here to connect with friends.
identity.staleTitle: This device is out of sync
identity.staleDescription: Your keys were rotated on another device. Tap a passkey to sync this device — until you do, your saved data here won't match what's on your other devices.

rotateKeys.title: Rotate all keys
rotateKeys.description: Swap your master key for a new one and re-encrypt everything under it.
rotateKeys.subDescription: You'll tap each registered passkey once so we can re-secure it against the new key.

warning.keepOpen: Keep this tab open until it finishes.
warning.tapEach: Any passkey you don't tap before finishing won't work for recovery afterward — have at least one passkey or your recovery key ready.
warning.failsSafe: If rotation fails partway, nothing changes on the server.

rotateKeys.runningDescription: Don't close this tab. We'll let you know when it's safe to continue.
rotateKeys.doneDescription: Your data has been re-encrypted under a new master key.
rotateKeys.slotWarning: Passkey {id}… was not re-secured ({reason}). It will no longer work for recovery — remove and re-add it.

progress.resealingSlot: Tap your passkey to re-secure slot {index} of {total}

security.title: Encryption keys
security.description: Your private keys encrypt your data end-to-end
security.recoveryKeyDescription: A backup of your encryption keys. Save it to restore access if you lose every device.
security.rotateKeysDescription: Generate new encryption keys and re-encrypt your data under them.
security.setupAnotherDeviceDescription: Share your encryption keys with a new phone or browser so it can read your encrypted data.

recoveryKey.setupDescription: Create your federation identity with end-to-end encryption
recoveryKey.importDescription: Restore your identity using your recovery key
recoveryKey.viewDescription: Save this key securely to recover your identity on other devices
recoveryKey.warning: Keep this key secret! Anyone with this key can access your encrypted data.
recoveryKey.confirmSaved: I have saved my recovery key securely

locationSettings.title: Location Sharing
locationSettings.description: Choose which friends can see your real-time location. All location data is end-to-end encrypted.
locationSettings.addFriendsPrompt: Add friends to start sharing your location.
locationSettings.e2eeNotice: Your location is encrypted on your device before being sent. Only the friends you choose can decrypt and see your location. The server never sees your actual coordinates.

detail.noLocationDescription: This friend hasn't shared their location with you yet.
detail.sharingEnabled: Your location is shared with this friend
detail.sharingDisabled: Your location is hidden from this friend
detail.heading: Heading
detail.removeConfirmation: Are you sure you want to remove {name} as a friend? This will also stop all location sharing.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.toggleDescription: Toggle the navigation sidebar between minimized and expanded

transit.checkBackLater: Check back later or visit the transit provider's website

setup.title: Set Up Federation Identity
setup.description: Your recovery key is your last-resort way back in if you lose every device. Save it somewhere safe — a password manager is ideal. We'll offer to set up a passkey for everyday recovery in the next step.
setup.importantDescription: If you lose this key AND every passkey, you will need to create a new identity and re-add all your friends.
setup.keyCopiedToast: Recovery key copied. Paste it into your password manager.
setup.masterPasswordHint: Like a master password. Keep it secret and safe.
setup.confirmSavedLabel: I have saved my recovery key in a secure location

passkeyOffer.title: Add a passkey for recovery?
passkeyOffer.description: Passkeys let you recover your identity on a new device with a single tap, no recovery key required. You can always add more later from Settings.
passkeyOffer.alertDescription: Your recovery key is already safe. Adding a passkey is optional but strongly recommended.
passkeyOffer.existingHint: Tap it below to enable recovery on it. Some browsers or older passkeys can't do this — if it doesn't work, use "Add new" instead.
passkeyOffer.cannotUseError: This passkey can't be used for recovery. Try adding a new one.
passkeyOffer.enableFailedError: Could not enable passkey recovery. You can still finish setup using your recovery key.

import.chooseDescription: Tap one of your registered passkeys to recover your identity on this device.
import.typeKeyDescription: Enter your recovery key to restore your identity on this device.

reset.confirmDescription: This permanently erases all your encrypted data on this account — saved places, collections, friends, and sharing settings. Your email and passkeys stay, so you can keep signing in. This can't be undone.

view.title: Your recovery key
view.description: A backup for your account. Save it somewhere safe.
view.federationIdLabel: Your federation ID — share with friends
view.keepSecretDescription: Anyone with this key can sign in as you on any device.
view.keyLabel: Recovery key — save in a password manager or print it

choose.title: Set up another device
choose.description: Sign in on a new phone or browser. Both devices stay signed in — this one doesn't lose anything.
choose.currentDeviceHint: Scan the QR on the new device to share your identity with it
choose.newDeviceHint: Show a QR for your current device to scan

receive.title: Scan this with your other device
receive.description: On your signed-in device, open Set up another device → This is my current device, then scan this QR.
receive.verifyDescription: Compare the code below with the one shown on your other device. If they're different, cancel — someone may be intercepting the transfer.

send.title: Scan your new device
send.description: Point the camera at the QR code shown on your new device.
send.viewfinderHint: Point the camera at the QR on your new device.
send.verifyDescription: Your new device should now show the same 6-digit code. If yes, tap "Codes match" on the new device to finish.

errors.sessionExpired: Transfer session expired. Close this and try again — each session is good for 60 seconds.
errors.noServerIdentity: Server has no federation identity to verify the sender's signature.
errors.seedMismatch: Transferred seed does not derive the expected federation identity.
errors.invalidQr: The scanned QR is not a valid Parchment transfer code.
errors.missingQrData: The scanned QR is missing transfer session data.
errors.noSeed: This device has no identity seed to transfer.
errors.sealUploadFailed: Failed to seal + upload the seed

columns.name: Name
columns.syncedHint: Yes means this passkey rides along with your password manager (iCloud Keychain, 1Password, Google) across your other devices. No means it lives only on the device that created it.

passkeys.secondTapToast: One more tap to finish setup.
passkeys.addSuccess: Passkey added. You can use it on any device.
passkeys.addNoRecoveryFallback: Passkey added, but it can't be used for recovery.
passkeys.recoveryOnSuccess: Recovery on. Use this passkey on any device.
passkeys.cannotUseForRecovery: This passkey can't be used for recovery.
passkeys.deleteConfirmDescription: You will no longer be able to use this passkey to sign in on any device.
passkeys.refreshKeysDescription: If this device was lost, refresh to keep your data safe. You'll tap your other passkeys.

sessions.deleteCurrentDescription: You're signed in here — continuing will sign you out immediately.
sessions.deleteOtherDescription: You'll sign out {browser} on {osName}. You can sign back in later.
sessions.signOutOthersDescription: You'll stay signed in here. Recommended if a device was lost or stolen.

units.title: Units
units.description: Preferred unit system for temperature, distance, and speed

floorNumbering.title: Floor numbering
floorNumbering.description: How floor numbers are displayed. Zero-based counts ground floor as 0 (common in Europe). One-based counts ground floor as 1 (common in the Americas).

values.matchTime: Match app theme and time of day

configuration.title: Map configuration
configuration.hdRoadsDescription: High-definition road visualization with enhanced detail

location.title: Location
location.startupLocationDescription: Choose what location is shown when the map first loads

style.title: Style
style.descriptionMapbox: Mapbox uses its own standard style

layers.title: Layers
layers.description: Choose layers to display in the layer selector

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Manage your configured external service connections

delete.title: Delete Integration
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete the {name} integration?

disconnect.title: Disconnect Integration
disconnect.description: Are you sure you want to disconnect the {name} integration?
disconnect.dependentsWarning: This will also remove {count} dependent integration(s) ({names}) that rely on it.

test.title: Test Connection
test.description: You must test your connection before saving
test.validation_error: Please fix validation errors before testing

descriptions.valhalla: Open-source routing engine for multimodal navigation
descriptions.wikidata: Structured knowledge base for enriching place information
descriptions.wikipedia: Free encyclopedia content and place descriptions
descriptions.wikimedia: Free media repository for place images
descriptions.openweathermap: Weather data and air quality information
descriptions.axiom: Send server logs and traces to Axiom for debugging and monitoring
descriptions.barrelman: Self-hosted OSM search and spatial engine
descriptions.openstreetmap-account: Add notes, comments, and make quick edits

endToEnd.formNote: End-to-end encrypted. Your URL and API token are encrypted on this device before upload — the Parchment server never sees them.

scheme.setupRequired: Set up your encryption keys in Settings → Encryption keys before configuring this integration.

osm.configureOAuthApp: Configure OAuth application on OSM server
osm.devCallbackInstructions: Dev mode: After authorizing in the browser, copy the full redirect URL and run window.__osmDevCallback('URL') in the console

notes.createDescription: Drag the marker to adjust the location. Describe the issue or suggestion below.
notes.createPlaceholder: Describe what needs attention at this location...

notFound.subtitle: Wrong continent
notFound.message: Even Columbus was a better navigator.

sharing.title: Share "{name}"
sharing.description: Manage who can access this collection

restricted.title: Restricted
restricted.description: Only invited people can open this collection.

anyoneWithLink.title: Anyone with the link
anyoneWithLink.description: Anyone on the internet with the link can view.

e2ee.title: End-to-end encrypted
e2ee.description: Only invited friends can decrypt this collection. Public link unavailable.

upgradeConfirm.title: Switch to end-to-end encryption?
upgradeConfirm.description: Every saved place in this collection will be re-encrypted under your personal key. The Parchment server will no longer be able to read them. Any public link will be revoked. Friends with access will be re-shared under the new key.

downgradeConfirm.title: Switch to server-stored encryption?
downgradeConfirm.description: The Parchment server will be able to read every saved place in this collection. Friends with access will be re-shared under the new scheme. This cannot be undone without switching back and re-encrypting.

errors.copyFailed: Copy failed — select and copy the link manually
errors.identityRequired: Set up your encryption keys in Settings before sharing
errors.missingFriendKey: This friend's keys aren't synced yet; try again in a moment

signIn.termsAndPrivacy: By continuing, you agree to Parchment's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

passkey.restoringDescription: Tap your passkey one more time to unlock your encrypted data.
passkey.restoreFailed: Couldn't restore your data — try again from Settings → Encryption keys.
